narrative.headline: 2020 Honda Pilot: electrical complaints dominate
narrative.summary: Owners filed 460 complaints with NHTSA. The electrical system is by far the most reported area at 44%, followed by the engine (20%) and forward collision avoidance (17%). No deaths are reported. The engine area stands out for fire: 4 of its 93 reports involved a fire, so it is worth a close look.

issues.sample: WE'VE HAD 3 HONDAS AND HAVE BEEN VERY LOYAL HONDA FANS FOR, CLAIMING TO NEVER BUY ANOTHER BRAND. WE BOUGHT OUR PILOT BRAND NEW AND LOVED IT. WE'RE AT 3700 MILES AND HAVING MAJOR ELECTRICAL ISSUES. THE SPEAKERS CRACKLE AND POP LOUDLY CONSTANTLY, WITH THE AUDIO ON OR OFF SO THERE'S
issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: The single biggest complaint: 202 reports (44%), tied to 2 crashes, 1 fire, and 3 injuries. This area accounts for nearly half of all complaints.

issues.sample: BOUGHT NEW 2020 BLACK EDITION HONDA PILOT ON MAY 2,2020 WITH 11 MILES ON IT. IT CAUGHT ON FIRE ON 6/15/20 AFTER DRIVING ONLY 3 MILES I NOTICED A BAD BURNT SMELL AS I WAS ENTERING A PARKING GARAGE, NOT THINKING IT WAS MY CAR BECAUSE IT WAS NEW AND THERE WERE NO DISPLAY LIGHTS INDI
issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: Second most reported: 93 reports (20%), including 4 with fire and no crashes or injuries. The fire count makes this worth checking carefully.

issues.sample: FALSE COLLISION WARNINGS AND FAILS TO ALERT TO ACTUAL POTENTIAL COLLISIONS.  ALERTS AND REACTS TO NON-EXISTENT COLLISIONS CAUSING UNNECESSARY ANXIETY AND REACTIONS BY DRIVER. SPEEDS VARY FROM 35 MPH TO 60+.    FAILURE TO REACT WAS ON HIGHWAY AT A SPEED IN EXCESS 55 MPH.  OCCURS O
issues.title: Forward Collision Avoidance
issues.blurb: 77 reports (17%), linked to 1 crash and 1 injury. Test the collision-warning system during a drive.

issues.title: Lane Departure
issues.blurb: 36 reports (8%), with 1 injury and no crashes or fires. A smaller but recurring complaint area.

issues.title: Power Train
issues.blurb: The fewest of the top five: 33 reports (7%), with 1 injury and no crashes or fires.
